visual_filters.name: Filter
conditions: (CONTAINS(v.NAME, Plnt Ef NH3-N MAvg)) OR (CONTAINS(v.NAME, Plnt Ef NH3N MAvg))
(CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Ef CBOD Wk AVG)) OR (CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, CBOD Wk AVG))
CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Ef NH3-N Wk AVG)
CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Ef TSS Wk AVG)
(CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, CBOD Load Avg)) OR (CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Eff CBOD Load Av))
CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Eff TSS Load Avg)
(CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, NH3N Load Avg)) OR (CONTAINS(v.S. NAME, Eff NH3N Load Av))

custom_kpi_meta.page_subtitle: Weekly, monthly, and loading metrics for effluent regulatory tracking.
custom_kpi_meta.footer_copy: Regulatory KPI (2/3) is rebuilt from the PBIX weekly/monthly/load parameter filters and active permit rows.
